items.name: Onion Balls (2pc) (GF) (DF)
items.description: Crispy onions bound together with lightly spiced chickpeas batter.

items.name: Aaloo Chops (2pc) (GF) (DF)
items.description: Potato patties filled with green peas and spices served with homemade tomato sauce.

items.name: Samosa Chaat
items.description: Popular savoury snack; crushed samosa is served with onion, green chilli, yoghurt, tamarind sauce, mint sauce and fresh coriander.

items.name: Aaloo Tikka Chaat (GF)
items.description: Potato patties topped up with onions, green chilli, yoghurt, tamarind sauce, mint sauce and fresh coriander.

items.name: Mushroom Pakoda (GF) (DF)
items.description: Chickpea batter mushroom cooked till crisp. Served with mint sauce.

items.name: Prawn Pakoda (GF) (DF)
items.description: Lightly spiced chickpea batter prawns cooked till crisp. Served with mint sauce.

items.name: Chicken Chhoyla (DF) (GF)
items.description: All-time favourite among Nepalese. Grilled chicken tossed with fresh ginger, lemon juice, garlic, coriander and spring onion.

items.name: Chicken Chilli (DF)
items.description: Crispy chicken sautéed with onions, tomato, capsicum and tomato sauce garnished with freshly chopped spring onion.

items.name: Saffron Chicken Tikka (GF)
items.description: Boneless chicken marinated in saffron essence, yoghurt and spices cooked in clay tandoor till tender.

items.name: Tandoori Chicken (GF)
items.description: Packed with flavours, the chicken with bone is marinated in yoghurt and homemade spices.

items.name: Tandoori Lamb Cutlet (3pc) (GF)
items.description: Tender lamb cutlets marinated in yoghurt and spices cooked in clay tandoor till tender.

items.name: Chilli Paneer (GF)
items.description: Paneer tossed with onions, tomato, capsicum and tomato sauce garnished with freshly chopped spring onion.

items.name: Taas (GF) (DF)
items.description: Goat marinated in Nepali herbs and spices and slowly cooked.

items.name: Steamed Momo (10pc)
items.description: Chicken or vegetable dumpling served with homemade sesame seeds and tomato chutney.

items.name: Jhol Momo (10pc)
items.description: Steamed Chicken or Vegetarian dumpling served with soya bean, sesame seed and tomato based chutney garnished with coriander.

items.name: Fried Momo (10pc)
items.description: Fried Chicken or Vegetarian dumpling served with homemade sesame seed and tomato chutney.

items.name: Soup Momo
items.description: Steamed Chicken or Vegetarian dumpling served with chicken or vegetable broth and homemade sesame based tomato chutney on the side.

items.name: C-Momo (10pc)
items.description: Chicken or Vegetarian dumplings tossed in onions, capsicum, chilli sauce and garnished with spring onions.

items.name: Momo Platter
items.description: Choice of Chicken or Vegetarian 4pc Steam, 4pc Fried, 4pc Kothey, 4pc C-Momo served with homemade sesame and tomato chutney.

items.name: Aaloo Bodi Tama (GF) (DF)
items.description: Traditional comfort Nepalese curry prepared with black eye beans, potatoes, bamboo shoots and homemade spices.

items.name: Yellow Daal (GF)
items.description: A simple lentil with flavours of tempered cumin, onion, ginger, garlic, tomatoes and coriander.

items.name: Kalo Daal (GF)
items.description: It is the most loved lentil among Nepalese people. It has a flavourful and satisfying taste. It is tempered with cumin, onion, ginger, garlic, tomatoes and coriander.

items.name: Vegetable Korma (GF)
items.description: A mild curry with cream base, cashew nuts and spices cooked in seasonal fresh vegetables.

items.name: Palak Paneer (GF)
items.description: Fresh blended spinach cooked with cottage cheese, tomato, onion with a touch of spices and fresh cream.

items.name: Paneer Butter Masala (GF)
items.description: Cottage cheese cooked with onions, tomato, ginger, garlic, butter, cream and coriander leaves.

items.name: Malai Kofta (GF)
items.description: Potato and cottage cheese fried and cooked in onion, tomato, cashew nuts, cream and spices.

items.name: Chickpea and Potato Curry (GF) (DF)
items.description: Chickpea and potatoes cooked with cumin, onion, tomatoes, ginger, garlic and spices.

items.name: Chicken Curry (GF) (DF)
items.description: A traditional chicken curry cooked in Nepalese spices and herbs garnished with fresh coriander.

items.name: Butter Chicken (GF)
items.description: One of the well-known dishes among curry lovers, this flavourful grilled chicken is cooked in ground cashew nuts paste and spices giving a mild taste to the dish.

items.name: Chicken Tikka Masala (GF)
items.description: Boneless tandoori chicken cooked with onions, tomatoes, capsicum and lightly spiced creamy sauce.

items.name: Chicken Vindaloo (GF) (DF)
items.description: Vindaloo is tangy, sweet and hot gravy, flavoured by charred grilled chicken garnished with fresh coriander.

items.name: Saag Chicken (GF)
items.description: Chicken curry with spinach cooked with onions, garlic and tomatoes.

items.name: Lamb Rogan Josh (GF) (DF)
items.description: An aromatic slow-cooked lamb curry with flavours giving a melting tender taste and enticing spices. It is garnished with coriander leaves.

items.name: Lamb Korma (GF)
items.description: A mild curry with cream base, cashew nuts and spices.

items.name: Lamb Vindaloo (GF) (DF)
items.description: Cooked in a hot and tangy red sauce. It is garnished with coriander leaves.

items.name: Saag Lamb (GF)
items.description: Lamb curry with spinach cooked with onions, garlic and tomatoes.

items.name: Goat Curry (GF) (DF)
items.description: A popular dish among households, the goat with bone is cooked till tender using onions, garam masala, ginger, garlic and tomatoes. It is garnished with fresh chopped coriander.

items.name: Jal Pari (Fish Chilli) (GF) (DF)
items.description: Barramundi fillets tossed in garlic, capsicum, onions and tomato sauce garnished with lemon wedge and fresh coriander.

items.name: Fish Curry (GF) (DF)
items.description: Barramundi fish cooked with homemade Nepalese spices and garnished with fresh coriander.

items.name: Prawn Curry (GF) (DF)
items.description: Prawns cooked in coconut milk and homemade tomato sauce.

items.name: Mixed Seafood Curry (GF) (DF)
items.description: Mixed seafood cooked with homemade Nepalese spices and garnished with fresh coriander.

items.name: Prawn Chilli (GF) (DF)
items.description: Prawn sautéed with onions, tomato, and capsicum and tomato sauce garnished with freshly chopped spring onion.

items.name: Khaja Thali (GF) (DF)
items.description: A set of chicken chhoyla, bhatmas sadheko, aaloo ko achar and chiura.

items.name: Vegetarian Thali (GF)
items.description: Known as Daal-Bhaat-Tarkari, this set comes with rice, three vegetarian curries, Saag (Spinach), aaloo ko achar and pappadum.

items.name: Non Vegetarian Thali (GF)
items.description: Daal-Bhaat-Tarkari, this set comes with rice, a choice of meat (Chicken or Goat), Daal, vegetarian curry, Saag (Spinach), aaloo ko achar and pappadum.

items.name: Plain Rice (DF)
items.description: Traditional basmati rice cooked till soft and fluffy.

items.name: Saffron Rice
items.description: A savoury dish with a delicate, floral aroma.

items.name: Biryani
items.description: One of the most loved delicacies; it has an aromatic and hearty combination of spices. It is served with raita (spiced yogurt).

items.name: Chow Mein
items.description: Stir fried noodles cooked with fresh veggies, spring onions, coriander with a hint of Nepalese spices.

items.name: Fried Rice
items.description: Stir fried rice cooked with chicken or vegetable, fresh onions, soya sauce and fresh herbs.

items.name: Thukpa
items.description: Rich, savoury noodle soup cooked with a choice of vegetable or chicken.

items.name: Naan
items.description: Choice of Plain, Garlic, Mint, Butter

items.name: Roti
items.description: Freshly baked in a tandoor, the bread is made from wholemeal flour.

items.name: Aaloo ko achar
items.description: Aaloo ko achar (Masala marinate potatoes salad)

items.name: Jerry
items.description: Fried batter into spiral shapes which are then coated with sugar syrup

items.name: Rasmalai
items.description: Juicy cheese discs served with thickened milk

items.name: Gajar Ko Halwa
items.description: Gajar Ko Halwa (Carrot pudding)

items.name: Kheer
items.description: Kheer (Rice pudding)

items.name: Gulab Jamun
items.description: Gulab jamun (also spelled gulaab jamun) are a milk-solid-based South Asian sweet

items.name: Soft drinks
items.description: (Coke, Coke Zero, Fanta, Sprite, Lemon Lime Bitters, Ginger Beer)

items.name: Lassi
items.description: Mango or Sweet or Salty
